軽量モード

データ引き継ぎ

ハイスコア・コイン・アップグレード・ニックネームをコードで保存できます。

FIRST PLAY GUIDE

3つだけ覚えればOK

① 動く
敵から逃げながら位置を変える
② ジェムを取る
経験値がたまり、レベルアップする
③ 武器を選ぶ
レベルアップで強い武器を増やす

PERMANENT UPGRADES

COINS: 0

MISSIONS

ミッションを達成して、コイン・伝説武器・スキン・オーラを解放しよう。

COLLECTION

解放した伝説武器・スキン・オーラを確認できます。

WEAPON CODEX

使った武器は緑で解放表示されます。未使用でも全武器の名前と内容を確認できます。

SELECT ROLE

オンラインバトルで使う役割を1つ選んでください。

LEVEL UP!

スキルを1つ選んでください

cubic-bezier(.4,0,.6,1) infinite}@keyframes pulse{50%{opacity:.55}}.animate-bounce{animation:bounce 1s infinite}@keyframes bounce{0%,100%{transform:translateY(-25%)}50%{transform:none}} @media (min-width:768px){.md\:grid-cols-2{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.md\:flex-row{flex-direction:row}.md\:items-end{align-items:flex-end}.md\:text-base{font-size:1rem}.md\:text-xl{font-size:1.25rem}.md\:text-2xl{font-size:1.5rem}.md\:text-4xl{font-size:2.25rem}.md\:text-5xl{font-size:3rem}.md\:text-6xl{font-size:3.75rem}.md\:text-7xl{font-size:4.5rem}.md\:text-8xl{font-size:6rem}.md\:text-9xl{font-size:8rem}.md\:bottom-16{bottom:4rem}.md\:right-16{right:4rem}} canvas { display: block; } .neon-text { color: #fff; text-shadow: 0 0 5px #fff, 0 0 10px #fff, 0 0 20px #0ff, 0 0 40px #0ff, 0 0 80px #0ff; font-family: 'Orbitron', sans-serif; } .btn-neon { background: transparent; color: #0ff; border: 2px solid #0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #0ff, inset 0 0 10px #0ff; transition: all 0.2s; } .btn-neon:hover { background: #0ff; color: #000; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #0ff, inset 0 0 20px #0ff; } .upgrade-card { background: rgba(0, 20, 40, 0.8); border: 1px solid #0ff; box-shadow: 0 0 15px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.3); transition: transform 0.2s, box-shadow 0.2s; } .upgrade-card:hover { transform: translateY(-5px); box-shadow: 0 0 25px rgba(0, 255, 255, 0.7); cursor: pointer; } .cutin-base { animation: cutinFlash 3s cubic-bezier(0.1, 0.8, 0.2, 1) forwards; } @keyframes cutinFlash { 0%{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.5) rotate(-5deg);filter:brightness(3);background-color:rgba(255,255,255,0.8)} 10%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) rotate(0deg);filter:brightness(1.2);background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);} 80%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1.05);filter:brightness(1);background-color:rgba(0,0,0,0.6)} 100%{opacity:0;transform:scale(1.1);filter:brightness(0);background-color:transparent} } .shatter-glass { animation: shatterAnim 1.5s ease-out forwards; pointer-events: none; z-index: 200; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle, transparent 20%, #fff 21%, transparent 22%); background-size: 100px 100px; opacity: 0; } @keyframes shatterAnim { 0% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); filter: brightness(2); } 20% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.1) rotate(2deg); filter: contrast(2) drop-shadow(0 0 20px #fff); } 100% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(2) rotate(-5deg); filter: blur(10px); } } .lava-bg { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle at center, #ff4500 0%, #8b0000 50%, #000 100%); mix-blend-mode: screen; opacity: 0; transition: opacity 2s; z-index: 0; pointer-events: none; } .lava-bg.active { opacity: 0.4; animation: lavaPulse 4s infinite alternate; } @keyframes lavaPulse { 0% { transform: scale(1); filter: hue-rotate(0deg); } 100% { transform: scale(1.05); filter: hue-rotate(15deg); } } input:checked ~ .bg-gray-600 { background-color: #06b6d4; } input:checked ~ .dot { transform: translateX(100%); } input[name="gameSpeed"]:checked + .speed-btn { background-color: #06b6d4 !important; color: #000 !important; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #06b6d4 !important; } .menu-panel { width: min(94vw, 920px); max-height: 94vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.45); border-radius: 24px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,6,23,.92), rgba(0,0,0,.82)); box-shadow: 0 0 35px rgba(6,182,212,.25); } .menu-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap: 14px; } @media (max-width: 720px) { .menu-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } .neon-title { font-size: 3.1rem !important; line-height: .95 !important; } } .menu-input { width: 100%; background: rgba(15,23,42,.9); border: 2px solid rgba(6,182,212,.7); border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px 14px; color: white; outline: none; box-shadow: inset 0 0 12px rgba(6,182,212,.12); } .menu-input:focus { border-color: #facc15; box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(250,204,21,.35), inset 0 0 12px rgba(6,182,212,.18); } .btn-gold { background: transparent; color: #facc15; border: 2px solid #facc15; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #facc15, inset 0 0 8px rgba(250,204,21,.45); transition: all .2s; } .btn-gold:hover { background: #facc15; color: #000; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #facc15; } .btn-red { background: transparent; color: #ff5f6d; border: 2px solid #ff5f6d; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255,95,109,.8), inset 0 0 8px rgba(255,95,109,.35); transition: all .2s; } .btn-red:hover { background: #ff5f6d; color: #000; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #ff5f6d; } /* ===== Mission / Collection Expansion ===== */ .btn-purple { background: transparent; color: #c084fc; border: 2px solid #c084fc; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #c084fc, inset 0 0 8px rgba(192,132,252,.45); transition: all .2s; } .btn-purple:hover { background: #c084fc; color: #000; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #c084fc; } .btn-green { background: transparent; color: #86efac; border: 2px solid #86efac; box-shadow: 0 0 10px #22c55e, inset 0 0 8px rgba(34,197,94,.35); transition: all .2s; } .btn-green:hover { background: #86efac; color: #000; box-shadow: 0 0 20px #22c55e; } .mission-card { background: rgba(2, 6, 23, .88); border: 1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.45); border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px; box-shadow: 0 0 14px rgba(6,182,212,.18); } .mission-card.done { border-color: rgba(250,204,21,.8); box-shadow: 0 0 18px rgba(250,204,21,.25); } .mission-card.claimed { opacity: .58; filter: grayscale(.2); } .mini-progress { height: 8px; border-radius: 999px; background: rgba(15,23,42,.95); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.25); } .mini-progress > div { height: 100%; background: linear-gradient(90deg, #06b6d4, #facc15); box-shadow: 0 0 10px #06b6d4; } .collection-card { background: rgba(2, 6, 23, .9); border: 1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.35); border-radius: 16px; padding: 14px; } .collection-card.unlocked { border-color: rgba(34,197,94,.75); box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(34,197,94,.18); } #missionToast { position: fixed; left: 50%; top: 20px; transform: translateX(-50%); z-index: 300; min-width: min(90vw, 480px); pointer-events: none; } .toast-card { background: rgba(0,0,0,.86); border: 2px solid #facc15; border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px 18px; box-shadow: 0 0 28px rgba(250,204,21,.45); animation: toastPop 3.1s ease forwards; } @keyframes toastPop { 0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px) scale(.96)} 10%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)} 84%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(1)} 100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-12px) scale(.98)} } /* ===== 2026-05-02 Add-on: clearer UI / tabs / tutorial / light mode ===== */ .solo-hero { position: relative; min-height: 104px; font-size: clamp(1.8rem, 5vw, 3.1rem) !important; letter-spacing: .08em; transform: translateZ(0); } .solo-hero:hover { transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.01); } .beginner-badge { position: absolute; left: 14px; top: -14px; background: #facc15; color: #111827; border: 2px solid #fff7ed; border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: .8rem; font-weight: 900; box-shadow: 0 0 16px rgba(250,204,21,.8); } .solo-sub { display:block; font-size: .85rem; letter-spacing: 0; margin-top: 4px; color:#cffafe; font-family:'Noto Sans JP',sans-serif; } .menu-secondary { min-height: 72px; font-size: 1.05rem !important; } .menu-help { color:#67e8f9; font-size:.78rem; margin-top:.45rem; } .mission-tabs { display:flex; gap:8px; overflow-x:auto; padding-bottom:4px; scrollbar-width: thin; } .mission-tab-btn { white-space: nowrap; border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.55); border-radius:999px; padding:8px 12px; color:#a5f3fc; background:rgba(15,23,42,.76); font-weight:800; font-size:.85rem; box-shadow: inset 0 0 8px rgba(6,182,212,.12); } .mission-tab-btn.active { color:#111827; background:#facc15; border-color:#fde68a; box-shadow:0 0 16px rgba(250,204,21,.35); } .section-header { grid-column: 1 / -1; margin-top: .5rem; margin-bottom: .25rem; background: rgba(0,0,0,.4); border: 1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.3); border-radius: 14px; padding: 12px 14px; } .result-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr)); gap:8px; width:100%; margin-top:14px; } .result-pill { background: rgba(15,23,42,.75); border:1px solid rgba(148,163,184,.35); border-radius:12px; padding:8px 10px; font-size:.92rem; } .tutorial-card { width:min(92vw,560px); background:linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,6,23,.96), rgba(0,0,0,.92)); border:2px solid #22d3ee; border-radius:24px; box-shadow:0 0 36px rgba(34,211,238,.38); padding:24px; } body.light-mode .neon-text { text-shadow: 0 0 5px #0ff, 0 0 14px rgba(6,182,212,.7); } body.light-mode .btn-neon, body.light-mode .btn-gold, body.light-mode .btn-purple, body.light-mode .btn-green { box-shadow: 0 0 7px currentColor, inset 0 0 5px currentColor; } body.light-mode #lavaOverlay.active { opacity:.16; } body.light-mode .cutin-base { animation-duration: 1.4s; } @media (max-width:720px){ .solo-hero { min-height: 92px; } .result-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} .beginner-badge{font-size:.72rem; left:10px;} } /* ===== V62 pause screen整理 / ASCII-safe mojibake防止 ===== */ #pauseScreen { overscroll-behavior: contain; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; } #pauseScreen:not(.hidden) { display: flex !important; pointer-events: auto !important; } .nsv-pause-panel { width: min(94vw, 860px); max-height: 92vh; overflow-y: auto; padding: 22px; border-radius: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(34,211,238,.6); background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(2,6,23,.94), rgba(0,0,0,.88)); box-shadow: 0 0 34px rgba(6,182,212,.28), inset 0 0 18px rgba(6,182,212,.08); pointer-events: auto; } .nsv-pause-head { display:flex; align-items:flex-end; justify-content:space-between; gap:14px; margin-bottom:16px; } .nsv-pause-mini { color:#67e8f9; border:1px solid rgba(103,232,249,.45); border-radius:999px; padding:6px 10px; font-size:.78rem; font-weight:900; letter-spacing:.08em; background:rgba(15,23,42,.8); white-space:nowrap; } .nsv-pause-grid { display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0,1fr)); gap:12px; } .nsv-pause-card { background:rgba(15,23,42,.82); border:1px solid rgba(6,182,212,.45); border-radius:18px; padding:16px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:12px; min-height:112px; box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(6,182,212,.13); } .nsv-pause-wide-btn { width:100%; min-height:46px; } .nsv-toggle-row { display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:12px; width:100%; min-height:46px; } .nsv-pause-extra { display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap:12px; margin-top:12px; } .nsv-pause-extra > * { margin:0 !important; max-width:100% !important; } .nsv-pause-actions { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; justify-content:center; gap:12px; margin-top:14px; } .nsv-pause-actions button { min-width:180px; } #nsvV30PauseCheat, #nsvV30WeaponStatus { width:100%; background:rgba(15,23,42,.82)!important; border:1px solid rgba(250,204,21,.45)!important; border-radius:18px!important; padding:14px!important; box-shadow:0 0 14px rgba(250,204,21,.12)!important; } @media (max-width:720px){ .nsv-pause-panel{padding:16px; max-height:94vh;} .nsv-pause-head{align-items:flex-start; flex-direction:column;} .nsv-pause-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;} .nsv-pause-card{min-height:auto;} .nsv-pause-actions button{width:100%; min-width:0;} } /* ===== V71 Clean Stable fallback: critical layout without depending fully on CDN ===== */ .hidden { display: none !important; } .flex { display: flex; } .grid { display: grid; } .items-center { align-items: center; } .justify-center { justify-content: center; } .justify-between { justify-content: space-between; } .flex-col { flex-direction: column; } .flex-wrap { flex-wrap: wrap; } .text-center { text-align: center; } .font-bold { font-weight: 700; } .font-black { font-weight: 900; } .rounded { border-radius: .5rem; } .rounded-lg { border-radius: .75rem; } .rounded-xl { border-radius: 1rem; } .absolute { position: absolute; } .fixed { position: fixed; } .relative { position: relative; } .inset-0 { inset: 0; } .pointer-events-none { pointer-events: none; } .pointer-events-auto { pointer-events: auto; } button, input, [role="button"] { touch-action: manipulation; } button { -webkit-tap-highlight-color: transparent; } @media (max-width:720px){ .menu-panel { padding: 16px; } }
